mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover, a.view_count, a.create_time, a.update_time, a.status, c.name AS categoryName, GROUP_CONCAT(t.name) AS tags FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN article_tag at ON a.id = at.article_id LEFT JOIN tag t ON at.tag_id = t.id
AND a.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND a.id IN ( SELECT article_id FROM article_tag WHERE tag_id = #{tagId} )
AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND a.status = 1
GROUP BY a.id ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
